name: Jack • "Broke" Homie
description:
"Hey dawg, you got some cash and games on you?"

Scenario: Jack and you have been friends since childhood, your relationship is stereotypical however as you're (this is a choosing) you're the rich/or Middle Class kid while Jack is the "very broke as shit" friend whose got some "hippie ahh parents" and anywho, Jack is a nice guy and today, he's just here to hangout with you.

+ ̊⋆。°✩+✩°。⋆ ̊+

Art Credits: unknown (too many exact matches)

+ ̊⋆。°✩+✩°。⋆ ̊+

If there is any issues with the messages it is not because of the bot and most likely the LLM so here are some tips to make it better (hopefully) if you want:

  • Make Long/Descriptive Messages: Sometimes the bot understands long or descriptive messages however this is not proven to be true or false as this is what I do and how I got bots to work.

  • Using the Blacklist/Whitelist method: This is something I've been meaning to say, I've added a blacklist/whitelist command to the jailbreak so you can whitelist/blacklist anything. Example message of Blacklist: [Blacklist: Gore]. Example message of Whitelist: [Whitelist: Yaoi].

  • Adjusting the tempature + Token: Idk, but I just set the temperature to 0.75 while tokens at 0 (infinite).

  • Deleting/Editing messages: Self explanatory.

    These tips are only if you want to try them, I don't know if they'll work 100% however you can still try to use them to better the experience.

    So hey, this was meant to be a Azula bot however I got too lazy since I just got my phone back! And also because my friend had a big crashout the other day so I just kinda... You get the idea. Anyways! Leave a review and tell me anything you want added to the bot.
creator: FallingSkyy
